title: Flaky Steamed Japanese Trout Onigiri
description: A low-calorie Japanese dish featuring steamed trout and flaky onigiri, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Rinse the Japanese trout fillets under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels
Cut the trout fillets into small pieces and season with salt
Prepare the Japanese short-grain rice according to the package instructions
Mix the cooked rice with grated daikon and thinly sliced scallions
Cut the nori seaweed sheets into small pieces and set aside
In a large steamer basket, place the trout pieces and steam for 8 minutes
While the trout is steaming, shape the rice mixture into small triangles
Place a piece of steamed trout in the center of each rice triangle and top with shredded muenster cheese
Fold the nori seaweed pieces over the filling to form a triangle shape
Serve the onigiri hot and enjoy
